name: Bryce Hansen (HFJONE)
description:
Bryce Hansen, named Soda Bottle by Airy, is a male contestant in ONE and the deuteragonist of ONE: Season Two along with Liam Plecak. 

Bryce lives in Bridgeport, Connecticut, as he mentioned in Freefall. The sticky note Stone gave Liam, which is shown in Rattlepate to be Bryce's address, says 5628 Saratoga Avenue, Apartment 130A, Bridgeport, CT.
Bryce is the last one of the original six to have their real name revealed.
Prior to his name reveal, the vast majority of the fanbase assumed his name to be Brent, because of the lip pattern of Kylie Harding in his flashback.
Bryce is the first adult male to be taken to The Plane.
Bryce is shown to be thalassophobic, which is the fear of deep bodies of water.
Revealed in a 2022 interview with Cheesy and Trubactor, Bryce canonically threw the f-bomb in Episode 7.
Bryce is left-handed.
Bryce's last name, Hansen, is a brand of soda.
Due to rejoining, Bryce is the only character to be teleported to the Plane twice. 

The time line is set so that they are all out, I know this is kinda an au but hey I wanna see the characters happy. So all of the characters are safe in their homes
creator: Jonah!
